title: Yocto/BitBake skills that make AI agents check official docs
abstract: Are your AI assistants ever caught spreading misinformation? Now, with the Yocto/BitBake skills, they can learn to check official documentation! Say goodbye to awkward "I don't know" moments and welcome a smarter era. Imagine asking about Beijing's weather tomorrow, and it actually checks the meteorological bureau’s website to give you an accurate answer. You'll be impressed by its dedication!
abstract_zh: 你是不是也觉得那些AI助手总是乱说一通？现在有了 Yocto/BitBake 技能，让它们学会查官方文档吧！从此告别尴尬的“我不知道”，开启智能新时代！想象一下，当你问：“明天北京天气怎么样？”它居然真的去查了气象局官网告诉你！这回你得佩服它的认真态度了吧！
